calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
ALbert Garcia, Esq. 510-848-5190 for Petitioner Vijay Kumar who is also present.
Kalev Kaseoru, Esq. Deputy Attorney General, 510-848-5190 Attorney General of California for Respondent Medical Board of California.
Court Reporter: Nichole Jacobs, CSR#13655, 707-761-6596, reported.

Argued. Mr. Garcia contests the court's tentative ruling. Mr. Kaseoru responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER BANGARUSWAMY KUMAR's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Taken Under Submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Nichole Jacobs, CSR#13655, 707-761-6596, Reported. (302/JMQ)
